description: §14.8.9 raw-egress fail-closed — a protected row reaching a compiler-unanalyzable egress (a manual `new Response(...)`) without reveal fires E-PROTECT-004 (error). The floor cannot prove redaction at an un-analyzable sink, so it fails closed rather than silently ship the protected column.
rationale: §14.8.9 closed-world precondition: an egress path the compiler cannot analyze (`_{}` foreign block, manual Response/handle body, asIs value) carrying a protected-origin column SHALL fail closed with E-PROTECT-004 — the confidentiality sibling of the read-site E-PROTECT-001, in the return-boundary direction. I-PROTECT-STRIP-001 co-fires (the SELECT * is tagged).
